description: GREAT UNITY IN FORCES IN RUSSIA IN THE FIGHT ON THE 80LSHEVIKI Colonel of Revolutionary Army Comes to United States for Aid v DEMOCRACY GIVES MOVEMENT FORCE Arms and Equipment Lack ing However in Scat tering Enemies Byasslftted Press New York Dec 11Col Vladimir Jj Lebedeff of the Russian army former secretary of the navy in Prince LvofTs and Kerenskys cabi net and one of the leaders of the party of SocialistsRevolutionists has come to the United States to enlist the sympathies of the Ameri can democracy for the movement of the Russian people who were fight ing for months on the Volga front together with the CzechoSlovaks sustaining the line against the Bol aheviki Deprived of the aid from the allies which these Russian forces had been led to expect they have been compelled to retreat and today Russia is menaced by the Bolshevist danger unless help is given her It 1b to enlist this help that Colonel Ijebedefe has come to this country Xiter he is going on the same mis sion to France Colonel Lebedeff was an officer in the Russian army in 1904 Efe took part in the RussoJapanese war and was wounded He was decorated
